name: Vaibhav Bhalala
title: Software Engineer
summary: Passionate software engineer with 2+ years of experience building scalable web applications. Strong foundation in full-stack development with a focus on clean code and great user experiences.

points: Developed and enhanced payment-related functionalities for Absa Group web banking applications, ensuring secure and seamless transaction processing.
Built and maintained microservices-based solutions deployed on Red Hat OpenShift to support scalable and reliable banking services.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deliver high-performance web applications and improve customer digital banking experience.

education.institution: Vidyavardhini's College of Engineering and Technology

projects.name: Portfolio Builder
projects.description: JSON-driven portfolio builder that renders resume sections dynamically, allowing users to update professional profiles by editing structured data without changing component code.
projects.flow: User updates cv.json -> App loads structured data -> reusable section components render conditionally -> Vite builds and serves a responsive portfolio UI.

projects.name: Expense Tracker
projects.description: Full-stack expense management app with CRUD operations, category-wise tracking, monthly and overall spend insights, and real-time dashboard updates.
projects.flow: Frontend form submits expense data to Express APIs via Vite proxy -> backend validates input and persists records in PostgreSQL -> client refreshes list and recalculates totals and monthly summaries.

projects.name: MoviesRecommendation
projects.description: Android movie discovery app built with Clean Architecture and MVVM, featuring genre filtering, paginated browsing, and offline-first access for smoother user experience.
projects.flow: ViewModel triggers parallel genre and movie fetches -> repository serves data from Room cache when available or from Retrofit APIs otherwise -> LazyColumn loads additional pages on scroll and opens source URLs on item tap.
